title: Steer monitoring dashboard
description: A Grafana dashboard published to the Steer dashboards store. The Steer metadata wraps a standard Grafana dashboard model (the 'dashboard' object). The Grafana model is validated loosely on purpose — Grafana owns its own schema and evolves it.

name.description: Display name in the Steer dashboards store.

uid.description: Stable Grafana UID. Must be unique. Steer embeds the panel by uid (/d/<uid>?kiosk).

datasource.description: Expected datasource type the dashboard queries (e.g. 'prometheus', 'loki').

dashboard.description: The Grafana dashboard model (panels, templating, time, etc.). Validated loosely.
